category_sources: Official TUG TeX Live page says TeX Live is a comprehensive TeX document production system distribution.
source_facts.description says TeX Live is a free software distribution for the TeX typesetting system.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official TUG TeX Live site, which uses the display name TeX Live.
docs_sources: Official TUG TeX Live documentation page is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; CTAN's TeX Live source tree entry lists the official repository as the TUG Subversion Build tree.
tags_sources: Official TUG TeX Live page describes included TeX-related programs, macro packages, fonts, and multilingual support.
